name: embedagents
description: STM32 development by talking to Claude — wraps ST's vendor tools (CubeMX, CubeIDE, CubeProgrammer, ST-LINK gdbserver, Signing Tool) plus a USB serial reader, as five slash commands and the `stm32` CLI they drive.
